query:
SELECT variantCode, variantName, variantType, status, productionStatus, isDefault, customerId, supplierId
FROM product_variants
WHERE variantCode IN ('DC-005-OAK-V001', 'DC-005-OAK-V008', 'DC-005-OAK-V009', 'DC-005-OAK-V010')
ORDER BY variantCode;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute SELECT variantCode, variantName, variantType, status, productionStatus, isDefault, customerId, supplierId
FROM product_variants
WHERE variantCode IN ('DC-005-OAK-V001', 'DC-005-OAK-V008', 'DC-005-OAK-V009', 'DC-005-OAK-V010')
ORDER BY variantCode;
